title: [codereview-pass1-mutex] coap_dtn.c: add K_MUTEX_DEFINE for s_dtn_buf and s_senml_pack protection per Zephyr conventions and native.c pattern
description: P0 security: static buffer requires mutex to prevent races between CoAP service thread, system workqueue, and potential RPL/router threads accessing DTN state. K_MUTEX_DEFINE(s_dtn_mutex); + lock/unlock pairs. Tagged codereview. Discovered during first chunk.
